introSection: Rage is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. The ride was built where the Raging River log flume once stood. It is an Euro-Fighter installation manufactured by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: Ride experience
sections.content: The ride begins with a 90-degree turnaround into the vertical lift hill. This is then followed by a 97 degree drop and then a vertical loop. The ride then goes in to a cutback followed by a 90 degree banked turn into a heartline roll. This is followed by two helices into the brakes and back into the station.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The roller coaster has a compact layout with three inversions. When it opened in 2007, it was the only 320 installation. Four more have since opened. It begins with a vertical lift hill and beyond-vertical drop.

fullText:
Rage is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. The ride was built where the Raging River log flume once stood. It is an Euro-Fighter installation manufactured by Gerstlauer.

The ride begins with a 90-degree turnaround into the vertical lift hill. This is then followed by a 97 degree drop and then a vertical loop. The ride then goes in to a cutback followed by a 90 degree banked turn into a heartline roll. This is followed by two helices into the brakes and back into the station.

The roller coaster has a compact layout with three inversions. When it opened in 2007, it was the only 320 installation. Four more have since opened. It begins with a vertical lift hill and beyond-vertical drop.
